<includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Added "1" positional parameter to module invocation to explicitly set value of number of redirect strings rather than relying on the default (1).
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect|1}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Treat blank param 2 as empty, per editprotected by [[User:Hairy Dude]]; change protection template to {{pp-template}}
changing curly quotes to ASCII quote char: italicized curly quotes look worse than ASCII quotes -- see comment on talk page
typographic quotation marks instead of cheesy typewriter ticks
add tracking category for missing redirects, per request
several other cases used in docs

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Added "1" positional parameter to module invocation to explicitly set value of number of redirect strings rather than relying on the default (1).
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect|1}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Treat blank param 2 as empty, per editprotected by [[User:Hairy Dude]]; change protection template to {{pp-template}}
changing curly quotes to ASCII quote char: italicized curly quotes look worse than ASCII quotes -- see comment on talk page
typographic quotation marks instead of cheesy typewriter ticks
add tracking category for missing redirects, per request
several other cases used in docs

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Added "1" positional parameter to module invocation to explicitly set value of number of redirect strings rather than relying on the default (1).

revision.comment: Treat blank param 2 as empty, per editprotected by [[User:Hairy Dude]]; change protection template to {{pp-template}}
changing curly quotes to ASCII quote char: italicized curly quotes look worse than ASCII quotes -- see comment on talk page
typographic quotation marks instead of cheesy typewriter ticks
add tracking category for missing redirects, per request
several other cases used in docs

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Added "1" positional parameter to module invocation to explicitly set value of number of redirect strings rather than relying on the default (1).

revision.comment: Treat blank param 2 as empty, per editprotected by [[User:Hairy Dude]]; change protection template to {{pp-template}}
changing curly quotes to ASCII quote char: italicized curly quotes look worse than ASCII quotes -- see comment on talk page
typographic quotation marks instead of cheesy typewriter ticks
add tracking category for missing redirects, per request
several other cases used in docs

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Added "1" positional parameter to module invocation to explicitly set value of number of redirect strings rather than relying on the default (1).
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:redirect hatnote|redirect|1}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
